texto: I often think publishing a book is like doing a poo. Once it's ready for the world, you have to relinquish that control and let nature take its course. A few will be impressed by your creation, others will be disgusted. Plus, no one will enjoy your success and achievement in producing it as much as you did.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a H.O. Charles: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “I often think publishing a book is like doing a poo. Once it's ready for the world, you have to r…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, humor, publishing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de publishing e writing.
